notes: Indian statutory authority operating Aadhaar — the world's largest biometric digital-identity system (1.3B+ enrolled). Publishes the Aadhaar Authentication API Specification, e-KYC specs, and AUA/KUA security requirements. Technical specs are free download with UIDAI copyright; AUA/KUA contracts are NDA-restricted.

data.notes: Free download with UIDAI copyright. Technical spec for biometric and demographic authentication against Aadhaar. Used by all AUAs (Authentication User Agencies) and KUAs (KYC User Agencies).

data.official_name: Aadhaar AUA/KUA Information Security Audit guidelines
data.notes: Members-only / NDA — bound by UIDAI participation agreement with AUAs.
